problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
hypothesis: Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting may resolve What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
